title: Cobblemon Greninja Dimension
description: Multiple exciting Fakemon based off Greninja with costum moves and abilities. All of these forms are from Cobblemon Mixed Dimensions
body:
In this Datapack i add 5 Greninja Fakemon, with some custom moves and abilities.

All of these Fakemon are from of [Cobblemon Mixed Dimensions](https://modrinth.com/datapack/cobblemon-mixed-dimensions) datapack.

To ask questions, leave suggestions or report bugs hit me up on [Discord](https://discord.com/users/422362779349942274)!

------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------

**📝HOW TO INSTALL📝**

To install the pack then instert GojoData into your datapack folder, the world's datapack folder and the resource pack folder. 

**ENJOY**

------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------

🔥CREDITS🔥:

[Sconda.](https://discord.com/users/sconda_): Made the Korean translation for the Data Pack.

------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------
Pokemon:

**_All the details about these Pokemon are in this spreadsheet:                 
✦︎[Custom Greninjas](https://docs.google.com/spreadsheets/d/1ncT42B2JZMJgX67-bbfuOsDKYH86ZApbho4Irem8ybs/edit?usp=sharing)✦︎_**                              

------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------

**FOR USE ON PUBLIC SERVERS, PERMISSION MUST BE OBTAINED DIRECTLY FROM THE CREATOR**
